underlying_goal: Manage release workflow for an Android weather app: research a feature, create PR, push beta release, fix release notes issues, and update project documentation
friction_detail: The release workflow generated bad compare URLs (0000000) due to using github.event.before for tag pushes, requiring user to notice and request a fix.
brief_summary: User managed a full release cycle (PR, beta release, CI fix, docs update) and Claude handled all tasks effectively, though the CI workflow needed a follow-up fix for broken release notes.
